description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the default Docker image with no services. Define four jobs—configuration, docs, style, and tests—all running in the default test stage. The configuration job runs `apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y cmake doxygen graphviz libboost-dev libsfml-dev libhdf5-serial-dev` then `./run_tests.sh -c`. The docs job runs `apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y doxygen graphviz cmake` then `./run_tests.sh -d`. The style job runs `./run_tests.sh -s`. The tests job runs `apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y cmake libboost-dev libsfml-dev libhdf5-serial-dev`, `apt-get install -y lsb-release`, `lsb_release -a`, `uname -mrs`, `g++ -v`, `ls -R /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/hdf5/serial/`, and finally `./run_tests.sh -t`. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
